mentions.note: European semiconductor capital equipment maker supplying Taiwan Semi and other foundries; rallied as demand validates equipment capex cycle.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; key supplier to chip fabs worldwide; Micron fab build will drive demand.
Semiconductor equipment supplier; machinery in short supply, creating bottleneck that perpetuates memory chip shortage.
Semiconductor capital equipment leader best positioned for leading-edge AI chip manufacturing; up 29-39% since January; benefits from Taiwan Semi capex surge and Micron multi-fab expansion.
Lithography equipment leader; critical to chip manufacturing expansion.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment; critical to scaling production in supply-constrained chip industry.
After $75 move today, wait for pullback before buying; don't want top tick; but still great company on weakness.
